vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting has not been implemented in the current code segment.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate a rate limiting middleware to control the number of requests within a certain timeframe based on the defined RATE_LIMIT_MAX and RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS policy is not implemented in the current code segment.
vulnerabilities.fix: Set up CORS with a whitelist of trusted origins to restrict resource sharing.
